package.name: welding_http_bridge
package.description: HTTP → /intents bridge for the ROBIN React dashboard. Runs an aiohttp server on port 8766 alongside a ROS2 node. The React UI calls POST /intent with {"intent": "...", "data": {...}} and this node publishes a welding_msgs/msg/Intent message on /intents. CORS-enabled for cross-origin dashboard access. Requires: pip install aiohttp
